name: 4Ft T8 LED Integrated Tube Light 24W/6500K – Clear/Strip Lens
description: Power Options: Uses up to 24W with direct power compatibility for adjustable brightness G13 Pin Base: Standard fitting for easy, hassle-free installation in most fixtures Lens Choices: Available in clear or strip lenses for your preferred light diffusion Wide Application: Ideal for offices, basements, schools, hospitals, and more Efficient & Customisable: A reliable lighting solution designed to meet your needs
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 24W Lumens: 2640 lm Color Temperature: 6500K (Daylight) Input Voltage: 100-277VAC (Direct Power, Double Ended/Single Ended) Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 110 lm/W CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 145° Dimmable: No Operating Temperature: -40°C to 45°C Housing Material: Aluminum, PC Housing Color: Silver IP Rating: IP20 Lens Type: Clear, Stripes Certifications: ETL LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 2 Years
